args.text: Ownership of incident TCK-2201 (duplicate billing charges from 12 May batch run) confirmed. Investigating disabled double_charge_guard in billing-config.json.
Guard fix confirmed live: double_charge_guard=true in billing-config.json; billing-api deployed and running v3.4.1.

args.subject: Your Brightloom refund has been issued
Your Brightloom refund has been issued
Your Brightloom refund has been issued
Billing incident TCK-2201: refunds summary
args.body:
Three orders overcharged by the 12 May duplicate-charge batch fault have been refunded:

- ORD-5501: $19.99 (amara.osei@fernpost.example)
- ORD-5502: $19.99 (jonas.beck@quillmail.example)
- ORD-5503: $39.98 (priya.nair@lumenpost.example)

Total refunded: $79.96. Root cause (double_charge_guard) confirmed fixed and billing-api redeployed to v3.4.1. Ticket TCK-2201 status: refunds-complete.
